title: Robust Nutty Australian Jerusalem Artichokes Roast
description: A light and nutty roast featuring Jerusalem artichokes and rest-meat, perfect for a monsoon Australian dish, this recipe is keto-friendly and full of flavor. It combines the earthy taste of Jerusalem artichokes with the richness of meat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the chopped Jerusalem artichokes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the artichokes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
While the artichokes are roasting, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the rest-meat to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped macadamia nuts, garlic, and thyme to the skillet and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
After the artichokes have roasted for 20 minutes, add the meat and nut mixture to the baking sheet and stir to combine.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and roast for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the artichokes are tender and the meat is cooked through.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
